task: Search for the cheapest apartment in Detroit for a student.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the task by searching Apartments.com for Detroit rentals, applying the Student specialty housing filter, sorting results by rent low-to-high, and identifying the cheapest result visible on the student housing results page. Evidence shows the student housing page URL https://www.apartments.com/detroit-mi/student-housing/ with sorted results where the first listing is 14299 Fordham St at $450+; opening the listing confirmed the page title and details: monthly rent $450-$595, 1 bed, and explicit notes that it is a room/shared space with by-the-bed leasing and individual locking bedrooms. The final answer accurately reported this and reasonably clarified that it is shared housing, plus noted the next cheapest private apartment/studio seen in the filtered results (Scovel Apartments from $650+).
final_result_response:
I found the cheapest student-housing result on Apartments.com in Detroit:

**14299 Fordham St, Detroit, MI 48205**  
- **Rent:** **$450 to $595/month per person**  
- **Type:** 1-bed room for rent, shared space  
- **Available:** Now  
- **Student-friendly features:** by-the-bed leasing, individual locking bedrooms  
- **Link:** https://www.apartments.com/14299-fordham-st-detroit-mi/s9flyj7/

Note: this is **a room in shared housing**, not a private full apartment. If you want the cheapest private apartment/studio instead, the lowest I saw in student-filtered results was **Scovel Apartments, studio from $650+**.
action_history: Opening Apartments.com: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.apartments.com/');
Searching Detroit apartments: await page.locator('e196').fill('Detroit, MI cheap apartments for student');
Sorting by lowest rent: await page.locator('e1067').click();
Opening student housing filter: await page.locator('e20').click();
Applying student housing filter: await page.locator('e1453').click();
Sorting student housing by lowest rent: await page.locator('e24').click();
Choosing lowest rent sorting: await page.locator('e587').click();
Opening cheapest student listing: await page.locator('e1053').click();

screenshots.title: Sorting student housing by lowest rent
